text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking around the academy, I spot Mejiro
Dober deeply absorbed in a book.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense... So adjusting one's diet is the
best way to burn fat efficiently...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Don't just jump out at me like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? N-no, this is, uh... Yes, I am...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell anyone I was reading this, okay?
Especially not Ryan and the others.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell anyone I was reading this, okay?
Especially not Ryan and the others.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They'd probably all scramble to help me if they
found out, but I don't want to bother them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The thing is... I'm not sure I'll be able to do this
right alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, come on! Do I have to say it outright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So, um... If you have the time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Can you help me with this as part of my training?
I think it'll be more effective that way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to try following what this book says, so...
could you help me out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We start working on Mejiro Dober's diet, and it
seems to really help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We start working on Mejiro Dober's diet, and it
seems to really help!
